items: Welcome by the School Board President, Alisa MacAvoy
Additions, Deletions or Modifications to the agenda.

If you have public comment related to a Regular Board Meeting item, please post it on: (https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSd3rKbPfVCTpOsK5ILqjnU2u-h- NuNx-vUq4OZxYNVR8lc4aQ/viewform?usp=sf_link) prior to the Regular Board Meeting or immediately upon the meeting opening.

llmResponse.agenda_changes: Multiple changes announced: Items 7.1, 7.2, 7.3 moved from section 7 to consent (section 6); Item 10.1 (grand jury response) moved to consent; Item 8.2A (continuation of study session on child nutrition) added after 8.2
llmResponse.consent_vote_words: Roll call vote, please. Trustee Wells. Aye. Trustee Lawson. Aye. Tracy Marquez. Aye. Vice President Diasokum. Aye. President Macavoy. Aye.
